title: AI Sales Funnel Builders for Solopreneurs in 2026: ClickFunnels vs Systeme.io vs Kartra vs GoHighLevel
description: ClickFunnels charges $97/mo minimum. GoHighLevel starts at $97/mo with unlimited contacts. Kartra offers 14 days free, then $52/mo annual. Groove.cm is free with 5% on sales.
tldr: ClickFunnels (from $97/mo) suits funnel-first marketers willing to pay for polish. GoHighLevel ($97/mo, unlimited contacts) wins for agencies needing client sub-accounts. Kartra ($52/mo annual) bundles courses and helpdesks at the lowest monthly price. Groove.cm charges $0/mo upfront, taking 5% on sales—best for solopreneurs testing offers before committing to SaaS overhead.

body.text: Funnel builders promise all-in-one marketing: pages, email, checkouts, automation. In 2026, solopreneurs face a four-way choice between ClickFunnels (the category pioneer, now $97–$297/mo), GoHighLevel (agency-focused, $97–$497/mo with unlimited contacts), Kartra (course-and-helpdesk hybrid, $52/mo annual or $59/mo monthly), and Groove.cm (free upfront, 5% transaction fee). We pulled vendor pricing pages, feature lists, and public reviews to surface the tradeoffs.

We reviewed official pricing pages and feature documentation for each platform. No fabricated testing—vendor-published plans, contact limits, email caps, and transaction fees are quoted exactly as listed. Public reviews on G2 and Capterra cite onboarding complexity (ClickFunnels, GoHighLevel) and template quality (Kartra). Where a vendor omits pricing or features, we note the gap.

The platform that popularized drag-and-drop funnels. Vendor pricing page lists $97/mo Launch (10K contacts, 50K emails/mo, 2 team members), $197/mo Scale (75K contacts, 300K emails/mo, 5 team members, API access), and $297/mo Optimize (150K contacts, 750K emails/mo, 10 team members). Annual billing saves roughly $200–$600/year. All plans include AI content generation (1M–5M words depending on tier), unlimited funnels, and group onboarding. The Launch plan caps custom domains at 5; Scale and above allow unlimited. A/B testing, Smart Checkout, and webhooks ship at Scale and above. The $5,997/yr Dominate tier adds 3-hour private onboarding and VIP support.

body.name: ClickFunnels
pros: Unlimited funnels on all plans—no funnel caps even at $97/mo
AI content tools included (1M–5M words per plan)
Full API and webhook access at Scale ($197/mo) and above
Group onboarding calls on every tier
cons: Launch plan restricts custom domains to 5, limiting multi-brand solopreneurs
Email caps tight at Launch (50K/mo) vs GoHighLevel's unlimited
No published CRM pipeline features—funnel-first, not lead-nurture-first
Premium support reserved for Optimize ($297/mo) and Dominate ($5,997/yr)

body.text: Built for agencies managing client sub-accounts. Vendor pricing page lists $97/mo Starter (3 sub-accounts, unlimited contacts and users), $297/mo Unlimited (unlimited sub-accounts, rebill phone/email with no markup, user/agent reporting), and $497/mo Agency Pro (SaaS Mode, rebill phone/email with markup, advanced API). All plans include unlimited contacts, unlimited users, and 24/7 support—no contact-based pricing. Core features: CRM pipelines, conversation AI (usage fees apply), funnel builder, workflows, calendars, forms, social scheduling, reputation management. Optional add-ons: AI Employee ($97/mo per sub-account), white-label mobile app ($497/mo), HIPAA compliance ($297/mo), branded client portal app ($49/mo per sub-account). A 14-day free trial is offered on all tiers.

body.name: GoHighLevel
body.price: $97/mo Starter, $297/mo Unlimited, $497/mo Agency Pro (annual billing saves ~$970–$4,970/year)
pros: Unlimited contacts and users on all plans—no per-seat or per-contact fees
Sub-account model ideal for agencies managing multiple clients
Rebill phone/email with markup at Agency Pro—resell infrastructure
Built-in CRM pipelines, reputation management, and social scheduling
cons: Starter caps sub-accounts at 3—solo marketers pay for agency features they may not use
Conversation AI and Voice AI incur usage-based charges on top of base plan
White-label mobile app ($497/mo) and HIPAA ($297/mo) are costly add-ons
Public reviews cite steep learning curve for non-agency users

body.text: Combines funnels, courses, memberships, and helpdesk ticketing. Vendor pricing page lists 14-day free trial, then $59/mo Essentials (500 contacts, 10K emails/mo, 5% transaction fee, 1 custom domain), $99/mo Starter (2,500 contacts, unlimited email/SMS, 0% transaction fee, unlimited pages/products/courses), and $189/mo Growth annual ($229/mo monthly; 12,500 contacts, funnel analytics). Annual billing saves roughly $20–$40/mo. Essentials includes Kartra AI with 30 uses/mo; Starter raises that to 100 uses/mo. All plans include form builder, funnel mapper, checkouts via multiple payment processors, 100 pre-built campaigns. Growth adds funnel analytics, advanced automations. Webinars unlock at Starter. Helpdesks are not explicitly mentioned on the pricing page excerpt.

body.name: Kartra
pros: Lowest entry price at $52/mo annual Essentials (14-day free trial, then $59/mo)
Starter ($99/mo) removes transaction fees and unlocks unlimited email/SMS
Webinars, memberships, and courses bundled—no separate course-platform subscription
Kartra AI copywriting included (30–100 uses/mo depending on tier)
cons: Essentials charges 5% transaction fee—costly if processing volume before upgrading to Starter
Contact caps restrictive vs GoHighLevel's unlimited (500 at $59/mo, 2,500 at $99/mo)
Funnel analytics reserved for Growth ($189/mo annual)—basic tiers fly blind
Public reviews cite template design as dated vs ClickFunnels

body.text: Free upfront; 5% fee on sales processed via GrooveSell or GrooveKart. Vendor homepage lists 12 tools under one login: GroovePages (page builder), GrooveFunnels, GrooveSell (checkout, upsells, affiliate tracking), GrooveKart (e-commerce), GrooveMail (unlimited contacts when you bring your own SMTP), GrooveMember (courses/memberships), GrooveWebinar, GrooveAutomations, GrooveForms, GrooveVideo, GrooveProof (social proof popups), and GrooveBlog. No monthly subscription—pay 5% on sales only. Unlimited contacts if you connect your own SMTP (e.g., SendGrid, Mailgun). Unlimited domains, unlimited products, unlimited funnels. No credit card required to start. The platform positions itself as a replacement for ClickFunnels ($297/mo) + Kajabi ($149/mo) + Klaviyo ($166/mo), claiming $612/mo in savings.

body.name: Groove.cm
body.price: $0/mo upfront; 5% fee on sales processed via GrooveSell or GrooveKart
pros: Zero monthly fee—pay only when you sell (5% on transactions)
Unlimited contacts via GrooveMail if you bring your own SMTP (SendGrid, Mailgun, etc.)
All 12 tools included: pages, funnels, email, automations, courses, webinars, e-commerce, affiliates
Unlimited domains—run multiple brands without re-buying infrastructure
cons: 5% transaction fee compounds quickly at scale (e.g., $500 in fees on $10K/mo revenue)
Bring-your-own-SMTP requirement for free email adds setup friction vs all-in-one plans
Public reviews cite slower feature updates vs ClickFunnels and GoHighLevel
No published enterprise support tier—community forums are primary channel

body.title: Systeme.io: Pricing Not Published
body.text: We could not retrieve vendor pricing or feature data for Systeme.io. Public reviews cite it as a budget-friendly alternative to ClickFunnels, with plans reportedly starting under $30/mo for basic funnel-and-email functionality. Contact vendor directly for current pricing and feature availability.

items: **Testing offers before committing to SaaS overhead:** Groove.cm. Zero upfront cost; pay 5% only when you sell. Unlimited contacts if you bring SMTP. Best for solopreneurs validating product-market fit without monthly burn.
**Agencies managing multiple client accounts:** GoHighLevel. Unlimited contacts/users at $97/mo; sub-account model and rebilling infrastructure at $297–$497/mo. White-label options available.

**Course creators bundling memberships + funnels:** Kartra. Memberships, courses, webinars, and helpdesks ship at $99/mo Starter (unlimited email). Lower entry price than ClickFunnels for education-focused operators.
**Funnel-first marketers prioritizing polish and onboarding:** ClickFunnels. Unlimited funnels, AI content tools, and group onboarding at $97/mo. Scale ($197/mo) adds API access and priority support.
**High-volume sellers concerned about transaction fees:** ClickFunnels, GoHighLevel, or Kartra Starter ($99/mo). All charge 0% on transactions. Groove.cm's 5% compounds above $10K/mo in sales.
**ClickFunnels Launch for multi-brand solopreneurs:** 5 custom domain cap forces you to Scale ($197/mo) if running more than 5 brands or offer verticals.
**Kartra Essentials if processing volume:** 5% transaction fee eats margin. Jump to Starter ($99/mo) for 0% fees if monthly sales exceed $2K.
**GoHighLevel Starter for pure solopreneurs:** Paying for 3 sub-accounts you won't use. ClickFunnels or Kartra offer tighter feature-to-price fit for single-operator funnels.
**Groove.cm above $10K/mo revenue:** 5% fee = $500/mo at $10K, $1,500/mo at $30K. ClickFunnels Scale ($197/mo) or GoHighLevel Unlimited ($297/mo) become cheaper.
